requirement_topic.en: Connector Compatibility: GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 连接器兼容性：GB/T 20234 与 IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 連接器相容性：GB/T 20234 與 IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Thailand projects, fleets, and charging operators may specify the IEC connector ecosystem: IEC 62196-2:2022 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3:2022 Configuration FF, commonly called CCS2, for DC charging. Connector choice is a hardware, communication, vehicle-compatibility, and procurement requirement, not merely a document substitution.
summary.zh: 泰国项目、车队和充电运营方可能指定 IEC 接口体系：交流充电采用 IEC 62196-2:2022 Type 2，直流充电采用 IEC 62196-3:2022 FF 构型，即通常所称 CCS2。接口选择属于硬件、通信、车辆兼容性和采购要求，而不仅是文件替换。
summary.zht: 泰國項目、車隊和充電營運方可能指定 IEC 介面體系：交流充電採用 IEC 62196-2:2022 Type 2，直流充電採用 IEC 62196-3:2022 FF 構型，即通常所稱 CCS2。介面選擇屬於硬體、通訊、車輛相容性和採購要求，而不僅是文件替換。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3:2022 Configuration FF / CCS2 DC couplers
Project, operator, fleet, or procurement connector specification

summary.en: GB-standard cn_common_equivalent: China commonly uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC charging interfaces and GB/T 20234.3 for DC charging interfaces. GB/T connector hardware and signalling are not drop-in substitutes for Type 2 or CCS2.
summary.zh: GB标准中国常见对应：中国通常采用 GB/T 20234.2 作为交流充电接口标准，采用 GB/T 20234.3 作为直流充电接口标准。GB/T 接口硬件和信号不能直接替代 Type 2 或 CCS2。
summary.zht: GB標準中國常見對應：中國通常採用 GB/T 20234.2 作為交流充電介面標準，採用 GB/T 20234.3 作為直流充電介面標準。GB/T 介面硬體和信號不能直接替代 Type 2 或 CCS2。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger package needs redesign or variant control for Thai IEC-facing deployments: Type 2 or CCS2 couplers, cable thermal rating, locking, proximity and control-pilot circuits, PLC communication where CCS2 is used, labels, spare parts, installation manuals, and retesting after connector changes.
gap.zh: 仅按 GB/T 设计的充电桩进入泰国 IEC 体系部署时，需要重新设计或建立变型控制：Type 2 或 CCS2 耦合器、电缆热额定、锁止、接近与控制导引电路、使用 CCS2 时的 PLC 通信、标签、备件、安装手册以及接口变更后的复测。
gap.zht: 僅按 GB/T 設計的充電樁進入泰國 IEC 體系部署時，需要重新設計或建立變型控制：Type 2 或 CCS2 耦合器、電纜熱額定、鎖止、接近與控制導引電路、使用 CCS2 時的 PLC 通訊、標籤、備件、安裝手冊以及介面變更後的複測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when required by the Thai project, operator, fleet, procurement document, or vehicle-compatibility route; otherwise a market-interoperability requirement rather than standalone legal approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity is a China GB-standard connector baseline and is not a substitute for Type 2 or CCS2 compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not present GB/T 20234 evidence as Type 2 or CCS2 evidence; confirm connector hardware and communication against the Thai deployment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将 GB/T 20234 证据作为 Type 2 或 CCS2 证据；应按泰国部署规格确认接口硬件和通信。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將 GB/T 20234 證據作為 Type 2 或 CCS2 證據；應按泰國部署規格確認介面硬體和通訊。
